body: You probably already love a good sheet pan meal, so trust us when we say a cast iron sheet pan takes this simple weeknight dinner method to the next level. This Greek chicken sheet pan recipe comes together quickly, and did we mention it’s packed with flavor? It’s our March Recipe of the Month, so go ahead and make it tonight!
